testcase.name: categories API > getCategories calls /v1/categories with flat=true
categories API > getCategories calls /v1/categories with rootOnly=true
categories API > getCategoryTree calls /v1/categories without params
categories API > getInventoryByCategory calls /v1/inventory/by-category with categoryId
categories API > propagates API errors
reports API > getInventoryTurnoverReport calls correct endpoint with params
reports API > getInventoryTurnoverReport strips undefined params
reports API > getAbcAnalysisReport calls correct endpoint
reports API > getAbcAnalysisReport without centerId sends empty params
reports API > getXyzAnalysisReport calls correct endpoint
reports API > getAbcXyzMatrixReport calls correct endpoint
reports API > propagates API errors
useCategories > fetches flat categories successfully
useCategories > returns loading state initially
useCategories > returns error state on API failure
useCategoryTree > fetches category tree with nested children
useCategoryTree > returns error state when tree fetch fails
useInventoryByCategory > fetches inventory summary for a given category
useInventoryByCategory > does not fetch when categoryId is null
useInventoryByCategory > returns error state on API failure
useEscalationPolicies > fetches policies when centerId is provided
useEscalationPolicies > does not fetch when centerId is null
useEscalationPolicies > create mutation invalidates policies cache on success
useEscalationPolicies > update mutation calls PUT and invalidates cache
useEscalationPolicies > delete mutation calls DELETE and invalidates cache
useActiveAlerts > fetches pending alerts
useAcknowledgeAlert > acknowledges alert and invalidates cache
useOfflineInbound > saves inbound data offline and updates pending count
useOfflineInbound > syncs pending records and clears them on success
useOfflineInbound > tracks pending count on mount
useOfflineInbound > does not sync when offline
useOfflineInbound > handles sync failures gracefully
useOfflineInbound > refreshPendingCount updates the count
usePwaInstall > initially is not installable and not standalone
usePwaInstall > detects standalone mode from display-mode matchMedia
usePwaInstall > detects iOS Safari from user agent
usePwaInstall > sets installable when beforeinstallprompt fires
usePwaInstall > promptInstall calls deferred prompt and sets standalone on acceptance
usePwaInstall > dismissPrompt sets dismissed state and persists to localStorage
usePwaInstall > restores dismissed state from localStorage
usePwaInstall > does not consider expired dismissal as dismissed
useReports hooks > useInventoryTurnover fetches report when dates are provided
useReports hooks > useInventoryTurnover is disabled when dates are missing
useReports hooks > useAbcAnalysis fetches ABC report lazily when enabled
useReports hooks > useAbcAnalysis fetches when enabled=true
useReports hooks > useXyzAnalysis returns error on API failure
useReports hooks > useAbcXyzMatrix fetches matrix data
useReports hooks > useExpiryWaste is disabled without date range
useReports hooks > useExpiryWaste fetches when dates are provided
useReports hooks > useLeadTime fetches lead time report
useReports hooks > useStockAging fetches stock aging report
